column1: # Sidecar metadata preserves the user-typed source across save+reload
# even when the forward translator decomposes the formula
# IronCalc's evaluator. Without the sidecar, reload would show the LN
# composition on the panel. With it, the panel still says `@CTERM(...)`.
# A3: @MID — arg-fix wrapper. The (start)+1 pattern is irreversible
# A5: @STRING — converts to TEXT with built format string.
# A6: @SUMPRODUCT — rewritten to SUM with array broadcast.
# Each formula's panel readout should match what the user typed.
